heading: Applicability
label: 8008 Applicability
text: This chapter is applicable to the United States and its territories, including American Samoa, the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico, Guam, the Commonwealth of the Northern Mariana Islands, and the United States Virgin Islands.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act” and was translated as reading “this title”, meaning title XIV of , known as the Virginia Graeme Baker Pool and Spa Safety Act, to reflect the probable intent of Congress.Pub. L. 110–140
